steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is Mathematician Grigori Perelman, a singular noun phrase. The phrase about working with Hamilton and Yau is parenthetical and does not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Match the passive verb
steps.content: B, C, and D use plural auxiliary verbs that do not agree with Perelman. The singular auxiliary completes the passive phrase credited with proving the conjecture. The answer is A.
